data.description: Container widths on the Campus page feel cramped — the body copy blocks that are left-aligned (the 'More than a WeWork' anecdote, the 'What's it like' section, the bio cluster, etc.) sit inside max-w-3xl which is constraining them more than necessary at md+ viewports. Combined with the outer px-6 md:px-[4.5%] padding on the section wrappers, the readable column ends up narrower than feels right. Scope: (1) investigate which constraint dominates at 375/768/1024/1280px — likely some combination of max-w-3xl on content blocks, max-w-7xl on section wrappers, and px-[4.5%] outer padding; (2) define a sitewide canonical max content width for left-aligned body prose (options: max-w-4xl, max-w-5xl, or custom) and codify in DESIGN.md; (3) audit + apply across Campus, Story, Lab, NLA, Political Club, Visit, Events, People, Protocol, Home — anywhere max-w-3xl is used on a left-aligned body block; (4) reduce section-wrapper side padding if that's also part of the issue. Out of scope: centered hero text widths (those follow a different rule). Mobile-first: verify 375px still reads correctly. Acceptance: consistent left-aligned body container width across all pages; canonical 'body container max-width' rule in DESIGN.md; no 375px regression. Slot in after FRAC-25 Campus apply lands — separate PR from typography/color migrations.
data.title: Reduce side margins and expand left-aligned body containers on Campus (likely sitewide)

data.body: Implemented — wrapped 13 body sections in max-w-3xl mx-auto containers. PR: https://github.com/jannar18/fractal-nyc/pull/200

Reviewed PR #200 against plan (fresh-context review).

Plan compliance:
- All 13 body sections wrap h2 + body block in a single <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto">: yes. Count: 14 occurrences, matching 13 sections — Build with us is correctly split into two wrappers (prose intro + outro) around the max-w-4xl bios grid as the plan specifies.
- Hero untouched: yes — line 194 still uses pre-existing "text-center max-w-4xl mx-auto" pattern, no edits to hero region.
- Grid sections preserved at wider width: yes — Meet the Space photo grid still uses max-w-7xl parent (only the prose intro got max-w-3xl mx-auto); Build with us bios grid kept max-w-4xl with mx-auto added for centering.
- No text-center introduced in this PR: confirmed (grep on added lines).
- Inner redundant max-w-3xl classes cleaned up from ul/p/blockquote elements where outer wrapper now provides width — consistent with plan's "prefer removing inner duplicates" guidance.

Checks:
- pnpm typecheck: pass.
- Only src/components/sections/Campus.tsx changed (+ lattice state). No other pages touched.

Verdict: pass.
